basicDetails.schemeName: Ayush Oushadhi Gunvatta evam Uttpadan Samvardhan Yojana (AOGUSY): Support for Development of Standards and Accreditation/Certification of Ayush Products and Materials in Collaboration With BIS, QCI and Other Relevant Scientific Institutions and Industrial R&D Centres

schemeContent.detailedDescription_md: The scheme-component "Support for Development of Standards and Accreditation/Certification of Ayush Products and Materials in Collaboration With BIS, QCI and Other Relevant Scientific Institutions and Industrial R&D Centres" under the "Ayush Oushadhi Gunvatta evam Uttpadan Samvardhan Yojana" implemented by the Ministry of Ayush, Government of India, focuses on strengthening the standardization ecosystem for Ayurveda, Siddha, Unani, Homoeopathy, and other Ayush products and raw materials. Financial assistance is provided to eligible organizations and institutions for research, testing, and development of quality standards, accreditation systems, and certification mechanisms. The scheme also supports capacity building, training of technical staff, and associated activities required for the development of scientifically validated standards. Each supported organization is expected to develop standards for a specified number of Ayush materials annually.
schemeContent.benefits_md: > **Financial Assistance:** - Funding up to ₹20,00,000/- per year per organization/institution for the development of standards and related activities. > **Reimbursable Expenditure:** - Salary of contractual manpower engaged in the project. - Collection and testing of samples. - Training of technical staff at PCIM&H, HPL, NABL, etc., as per approved norms. - Office expenses exclusively for the project. - Any other justified expenditure required to achieve project objectives. > **Expected Deliverables:** - Development of standards for at least 20 Ayush materials per year along with associated technical activities.
schemeContent.briefDescription: The scheme-component aims to support organizations and institutions in developing standards and accreditation frameworks for Ayush products and materials to ensure quality, safety, and scientific validation.

children.text: The scheme-component "Support for Development of Standards and Accreditation/Certification of Ayush Products and Materials in Collaboration With BIS, QCI and Other Relevant Scientific Institutions and Industrial R&D Centres" under the "Ayush Oushadhi Gunvatta evam Uttpadan Samvardhan Yojana" implemented by the Ministry of Ayush, Government of India, focuses on strengthening the standardization ecosystem for Ayurveda, Siddha, Unani, Homoeopathy, and other Ayush products and raw materials. Financial assistance is provided to eligible organizations and institutions for research, testing, and development of quality standards, accreditation systems, and certification mechanisms. The scheme also supports capacity building, training of technical staff, and associated activities required for the development of scientifically validated standards. Each supported organization is expected to develop standards for a specified number of Ayush materials annually.
Funding up to ₹20,00,000/- per year per organization/institution for the development of standards and related activities.
Salary of contractual manpower engaged in the project.
Training of technical staff at PCIM&H, HPL, NABL, etc., as per approved norms.
Office expenses exclusively for the project.
Any other justified expenditure required to achieve project objectives.
Development of standards for at least 20 Ayush materials per year along with associated technical activities.

applicationProcess.process_md: > **Registration Process:** **Step 1:** Visit the [Ayush NGO Portal](https://ngo.ayush.gov.in/register). **Step 2:** Fill in all the mandatory details and upload the relevant documents. **Step 3:** Verify the captcha and click on "Register". If required, click "Cancel" to discard changes. > **Login Process:** **Step 1:** Visit the [Ayush NGO Portal](https://ngo.ayush.gov.in/login). **Step 2:** Enter the registered email id, password. **Step 3:** Type the captcha and click on "Login". - User Manual: [Click here](https://ngo.ayush.gov.in/uploads/assets/Frontend_User_Manual_v-1.2.pdf).- Contact Us: [Click here](https://ngo.ayush.gov.in/contact-us).

eligibilityCriteria.eligibilityDescription_md: > **Eligible Organisation:** - Organizations or institutes engaged in the development of standards for Ayush materials. - Medical, scientific, and standards development institutions, universities, or institutional departments in the government or the private sector. > **Eligibility Criteria:** - Institutions must have adequate infrastructure and technical expertise to undertake standard development activities.

children.text: Organizations or institutes engaged in the development of standards for Ayush materials.
Medical, scientific, and standards development institutions, universities, or institutional departments in the government or the private sector.
Institutions must have adequate infrastructure and technical expertise to undertake standard development activities.
